title: FIRST Louisiana-Mississippi Information System
summary: Designed and built a relational database system to manage team data, event scheduling, and registration across the LA-MS FIRST Robotics region.

title: Lending Club Loan Analysis
summary: Analyzed a 10k+ row loan dataset to identify default risk patterns and borrower profiles using pivot tables, dashboards, and summary charts.

title: Robotics Matchmaking Data Pipeline
summary: End-to-end Python pipeline ingesting live match data from The Blue Alliance API for the Arkansas Regional FIRST competition. Outputs SQL-ready tables and KPI reports.
